scripts.build: npm run sync:dashboard-data && npm run prepare:static-images && astro build
scripts.test: node --test tests/*.test.mjs && npm run test:quality-gate && npm run test:relevance && npm run test:taxonomy && npm run test:repetition
scripts.test:quality-gates: node --test tests/article-detail-quality-gate.test.mjs tests/boilerplate-detector.test.mjs tests/homepage-quality-filter.test.mjs tests/public-template-phrase-guard.test.mjs tests/seo-quality-policy.test.mjs tests/source-extraction-fail-closed.test.mjs tests/source-text-completeness.test.mjs tests/strict-infrastructure-relevance-router.test.mjs tests/truncation-detector.test.mjs tests/proper-noun-normalizer.test.mjs
scripts.test:blog-engine-v4: node --test tests/graded-publishing-router.test.mjs tests/blog-eligibility-policy.test.mjs tests/blog-engine-v4.test.mjs tests/blog-length-policy.test.mjs tests/blog-tone-selector.test.mjs tests/blog-archetype-selector.test.mjs tests/human-blog-quality-score.test.mjs tests/multi-source-corroboration.test.mjs tests/source-fidelity-claim-check.test.mjs tests/homepage-blog-surface-policy.test.mjs tests/homepage-backfill.test.mjs tests/article-page-template.test.mjs tests/blog-surface-v4-regression.test.mjs
scripts.content:gate: npm run audit:public-copy && npm run audit:homepage && npm run audit:article-quality && npm run audit:feed-volume
scripts.test:autonomous-desk: node --test tests/editorial-cycle.test.mjs tests/global-source-scan.test.mjs tests/evidence-pack-builder-v2.test.mjs tests/editorial-thesis-generator.test.mjs tests/autonomous-blog-writer-v1.test.mjs tests/voice-variation-engine.test.mjs tests/editorial-archetype-router-v2.test.mjs tests/anti-template-guard-v2.test.mjs tests/human-style-score.test.mjs tests/insight-density-score.test.mjs tests/freshness-monitor.test.mjs tests/homepage-editorial-model.test.mjs tests/taxonomy-page-builder.test.mjs tests/company-entity-index.test.mjs tests/region-index.test.mjs tests/rss-builder.test.mjs tests/sitemap-builder.test.mjs tests/article-page-autonomous.test.mjs tests/copyright-safe-copy-guard.test.mjs tests/autonomous-public-surface.test.mjs
